diagrams.title: Transport Layer Position in OSI Model
diagrams.description: Shows the transport layer (Layer 4) positioned between application layer and network layer, with arrows indicating upward and downward service flow
diagrams.purpose: Visualize where transport layer services fit in the overall network architecture and understand its intermediary role.

diagrams.title: Multiplexing and Demultiplexing Process
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how multiple applications (web browser, email client, streaming app) send data through transport layer multiplexing into single network connection, then demultiplexing at destination
diagrams.purpose: Understand how transport layer enables multiple simultaneous communications over single network connection.

diagrams.title: Socket Pair and Connection Identification
diagrams.description: Visual representation of TCP socket pair showing four-tuple: Source IP, Source Port, Destination IP, Destination Port uniquely identifying a connection
elements: Annotation showing this forms unique TCP session
diagrams.purpose: Understand how sockets uniquely identify connections and enable process-to-process communication.
